name: Mazhar Zorlu Holding A.S.
summary: Mazhar Zorlu Holding A.S., through its subsidiaries, manufactures, sells, and markets various plastic pipes. It offers PVC and polyethylene pipes, and related parts and spare parts; and construction, agriculture, and infrastructure related pipes. The company is also involved in acquiring and selling of stocks. Mazhar Zorlu Holding A.S. was founded in1996 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.
